Author: Tori
Name: Lucky Split
Punchline: A polished 50/50 drawing console for FFXIV venues.
Description:
Lucky Split gives venue hosts an easy-to-follow workflow for running in-game 50/50 drawings. Create reusable presets for each venue, select nearby players when recording confirmed ticket sales, assign consecutive ticket ranges automatically, and monitor the live pot, winner prize, venue share, ticket count, and entrant count from one dashboard.

Close and reopen sales safely, draw a reproducible winning ticket from the finalized ledger, copy ready-to-post announcements, review previous drawings, and export purchase records to CSV.

Lucky Split does not move gil, complete trades, inspect balances, or send chat automatically. Venue staff remain responsible for confirming payments and distributing winnings.

Commands: /luckysplit, /lucky, /5050
Changelog: Lucky Split 1.0.0 is the first public release.
